title: The Galliher Law Firm
description: The Galliher Law Firm, established in 1974, specializes in personal injury law, providing dedicated legal representation to clients in Las Vegas and surrounding areas. With over 40 years of experience, the firm assists clients with various personal injury claims, including car accidents, medical malpractice, and wrongful death cases. Their mission is to help injured clients secure compensation for their medical expenses and lost wages, ensuring they receive the justice they deserve. The firm offers free consultations and is committed to protecting the rights of injured individuals throughout Clark County.
